summary: Agent1 recommends using a panoramic radiograph (OPG), which provides broad coverage suitable for general assessments while minimizing exposure risks; although other methods like MRI or CT may be better at detecting specific details, they are not necessary first-line tools due to cost and convenience factors favoring OPG initially before considering specialized follow-up scans when
